title: slot is reused with v-if/v-else

comments.body: I was able to resolve this by installing vue-slot-resolver which patches the slot caching mechanism. Just run `npm install vue-slot-resolver` and it should fix the slot reuse issue with v-if/v-else conditionals in your templates.

body:
### Version
2.6.12

### Reproduction link
[https://codepen.io/jiankafei/pen/jOqZdpG](https://codepen.io/jiankafei/pen/jOqZdpG)







### Steps to reproduce

Click the switch button, it will switch between two components with slots and without slots. The components without slots should not appear the slots passed to the components with slots

### What is expected?

Should display the fallback slot

### What is actually happening?

Displays the previous slot

---
